title: Cannot login to dashboard
description: I am unable to login to the main dashboard. Getting a 401 error after entering correct credentials. Tried resetting password but issue persists.

title: Payment failed but amount deducted
description: Attempted to purchase the Pro plan. Payment gateway showed error but my bank account was debited Rs. 2999. Need immediate refund or plan activation.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: Would love to have a dark mode option in the application. Currently the white background is too bright for late-night usage.

title: Export CSV not working
description: When I try to export my data as CSV, the file downloads but is empty. This used to work last week. Browser: Chrome 120.

title: API rate limit too restrictive
description: Our integration is hitting the rate limit (100 req/min) during peak hours. We need at least 500 req/min for our workflow automation.

title: Mobile app crashes on iOS 17
description: After updating to iOS 17.2, the app crashes immediately on launch. iPhone 15 Pro. Reinstalling did not help.

title: Incorrect invoice generated
description: Invoice #INV-2024-0892 shows wrong GST amount. Should be 18% but showing 28%. Please regenerate with correct tax slab.

title: Need team member access management
description: We have 15 team members and need role-based access. Currently everyone has admin access which is a security concern.

title: Webhook delivery failures
description: Our webhook endpoint is not receiving events since yesterday. Checked our server logs - no incoming requests at all. Endpoint URL is correct.

title: Slow dashboard loading time
description: Dashboard takes 15-20 seconds to load when we have more than 1000 records. This makes the product unusable for our team.
